nav.unifiedServicesBody: From company formation to audit readiness, streamline your operations with expert-led workflows.
nav.securePlatformBody: Access your client portal, run AI audits, and manage entity data securely.
nav.auditReadinessBody: Discover the actionable steps to prepare your financial records for strict compliance.

sidebar.description: VACEI is a modern accounting, audit and corporate services firm built around one structured digital platform. We handle accounting, compliance, corporate and audit work end to end, using our own technology to deliver clarity, speed and visibility.
sidebar.requestQuoteSubtitle: Share your requirements in a few steps.
sidebar.exploreServicesSubtitle: View accounting, audit and corporate offerings.

footer.tagline: VACEI is the structured digital workspace where businesses and founders manage professional services, compliance, and workflows in one secure environment.
footer.disclaimer: Professional services through VACEI are delivered by a network of verified professional firms. VACEI provide the digital environment to manage these engagements efficiently and securely.
footer.copyright: © 2026 What VACEI Is All right reserved

cookieConsent.title: We use cookies
cookieConsent.body: We use cookies to improve your experience and analyze traffic. By clicking “Accept”, you agree to our use of cookies.
